title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI video generation workflow using Claude Code to automate the entire production pipeline from idea or URL to finished video, including planning, visuals, voice, music, and editing. The system uses Archon as a workflow harness and HyperFrames as the video generation framework, eliminating the need for human editors, animators, or voice actors.
